steps.action: Run targeted test for checkout TTL constant
steps.observed: `lease-manager.test.ts` test `has checkout TTL of 60 seconds` passed

steps.action: Run targeted test for stale granted lease timeout behavior
steps.expected: Lease past checkout TTL is expired and run is cancelled
steps.observed: `stale-run-reaper.test.ts` test `expires and cancels a run whose lease is still granted but past expiresAt` passed

steps.action: Run targeted test for no-checkout pickup failure
steps.expected: pickupFailCount increments when run never checks out
steps.observed: `stale-run-reaper.test.ts` test `increments pickupFailCount when run never checked out the issue` passed

steps.action: Run targeted test for comment-driven activity renewal
steps.expected: Activity renews active lease and sets renewedAt
steps.observed: `lease-renewal-on-activity.test.ts` test `renewLeaseForIssueActivity renews lease when active lease exists` passed (renewedAt asserted non-null)

steps.action: Run targeted test for status-change activity renewal
steps.expected: Status change renewal extends active lease
steps.observed: `lease-renewal-on-activity.test.ts` test `renewLeaseForIssueActivity renews when called after status change` passed

steps.action: Run targeted test for explicit keepalive renewal
steps.expected: Keepalive renews active lease by runId

frictions.description: Vitest output includes high-volume embedded Postgres TRUNCATE CASCADE NOTICE lines, making summaries harder to read.
frictions.resolution: Used targeted test-name patterns and relied on final Vitest summary lines in saved logs.

frictions.description: Initial pnpm invocation used incorrect `--dir` form and failed with EACCES.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran the same targeted tests from repository root using `cd ... && pnpm vitest ...`.

summary: Tested 2 assertions via targeted Vitest surface: VAL-HARD-025 pass, VAL-HARD-026 pass. One command invocation failed initially (exit 243) and was retried successfully.
